summary: Implemented the complete Full Improvements Plan v2.2.0. All 13 todos completed: bug fixes (DownladerPlugin cancellation+progress, Videos.cs cleanup), new features (retry helper, system tray, enhanced notifications, per-chat date filter), UI improvements (dark mode, session stats strip), and infrastructure (Serilog file sink, yt-dlp auto-update, export/import settings). Fixed build errors caused by WPF+WinForms ambiguity by adding GlobalUsings.cs. Solution builds cleanly with 0 errors. Committed and pushed to main.
current_status: v2.2.0 is complete and pushed to main. All planned improvements implemented. Application builds cleanly. Next step would be to create a GitHub Release for v2.2.0 and test the application.
